expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md cites skill evidence: README.md "Explicitly lists: `developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md` under `context/`, derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios during Phase 7" and finalPlanSummary.mjs "Implements developer smoke extraction limited to `<P1>` and `[ANALOG-GATE]` and writes `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md`." result.md reiterates: "extractDeveloperSmokeRows() ... includes only scenarios ... tagged `<P1>` ... or contain `[ANALOG-GATE]`."

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: Both output files explicitly anchor the mechanism to Phase 7: execution_notes.md: "Validated that phase7 includes a concrete mechanism to generate `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md`" and references SKILL.md "Phase 7: finalization flow uses ... finalPlanSummary.mjs". result.md: "Output and reasoning must align to primary phase: phase7" and "The artifact is generated in Phase 7 finalization flow ... per `skill_snapshot/SKILL.md`."
